text.title: Platform Engineering Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals on the input to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Use when the right path is ambiguous.

decision-tree.root-question: Is engineering org size ≥ 50 AND DevOps ticket queue measurable (>50 / month)?

conclusion.verdict: Use a managed PaaS (Render / Fly / Heroku); revisit when org grows.
Backstage + Crossplane stack; Go / Node golden path first
First fix CI variance via golden path before adopting a portal; revisit portal in 2 quarters
Stand up Humanitec or homegrown orchestrator; defer portal until orchestration is real

text.example: size_lt_50=false → k8s_in_prod=true AND ci_standardised=true → Backstage + Crossplane + Go golden path. References rule backend-first-then-portal.
